rationale: Educ. Code §48.261 governs disaster remediation reimbursement for school districts. Itdoes not reference or depend on homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Any fiscal linkage to FSP entitlements is indirect and does not create a statutory conflict.
quote: The commissioner may provide reimbursement under this section only if funds are available for that purpose
_note: No direct conflict. The rule addresses disaster remediation reimbursement and references FSP fund availability, but does not incorporate or depend on homestead exemption levels.
